patches.find: are fits to the same public NOAA NP.xy time series
patches.replace: are constrained by the same NOAA-authored North Magnetic Pole trajectory record
patches.rationale: ISS-1876 (WIN-036.c5 moderate): The EXP-291 sentence confuses WMM2025 as a 'fit to NP.xy' — but WMM2025 PRODUCES NP.xy via Gauss-coefficient inversion from Swarm satellite data; NP.xy is its output, not its training set. The dome does curve-fit NP.xy. These are not symmetric operations. The fix preserves the common-source intent (both forecasts depend on NOAA's NP trajectory record) without the input/output conflation.
